sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23360" key="damalopo/dia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δᾰμᾰλοπόδια</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ων</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n23360.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">calves' feet,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:7:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
